title: Minecraft 1.20.1.1
description: Enter a world where chaos and horror are spreading where evil entities have taken control
body:
![cfg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4d1388b3a12b5645bb73440ba74648304df3141.png)
![dd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f665bb6b8a3e7b804eba965e9988c12e3505190e.png)
# Story
The beta version of Minecraft 1.20.1 was released on June 12, 2023, but you knew that mojang studio hid a version that was previously supposed to be released for the beta of the so-called "debug version of Minecraft" but was never released publicly but only to influencers, however according to the testimonies of Youtubers and streamers,   They have all been victims of several strange apparitions, horrible screams coming from their worlds, creatures that are not the ones we knew at that moment. Some have already been victims of blows as soon as they arrive in their world. The influencers reported this to Mojang and concluded that this version was cursed and then banned from publication until this day when a player on reddit came across this copy of the banned version of the Minecraft game.
![dd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f665bb6b8a3e7b804eba965e9988c12e3505190e.png)
# How to play
The goal of the game is to face all the monsters that are present to massacre you. Survive a completely gloomy world with a very stressful atmosphere

**_(be careful this version is not recommended for people with heart sensitivity and under 16 years old because this modpack has screemers)_**
![ss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f665bb6b8a3e7b804eba965e9988c12e3505190e.png)
# Mods
- Architectury API
- Cloth Config API
- Embeddium
- FancyMenu
- Geckolib
- Iris/Oculus & GeckoLib Compat
- Konkrete
- Melody
- Oculus
- Spawn Animations
- More...
